name: The Night Coder
blurb: You and your IDE see more sunrises than your bed does.

name: The 3 AM Philosopher
blurb: Your best conversations happen when the world is asleep.

name: The Morning Thinker
blurb: Coffee in hand, brain online before most people are.

name: The Weekend Warrior
blurb: Monday-to-Friday is real life. Saturdays are for adventures with AI.

name: The Recipe Hunter
blurb: You'd ask a chatbot before you'd ask your grandma.

name: The Pantry Improviser
blurb: Half an onion, expired yogurt, and rage. What can we make?

name: The Travel Planner
blurb: You've already drafted next year's trip in 3 alternate versions.

name: The Heart Whisperer
blurb: Some things you tell only the AI. We get it.

name: The Soft Launch Strategist
blurb: "Does this text sound too eager?" The AI is rooting for you.

name: The Couch Detective
blurb: You don't watch the show. You interrogate it.

name: The Career Climber
blurb: Your AI has helped rewrite your resume more times than HR has read it.

name: The Wellness Geek
blurb: Sleep scores, supplements, and second opinions.

name: The Wordsmith
blurb: Drafts, redrafts, and a small army of synonyms.

name: The First Draft Forever
blurb: "More concise. Now more formal. Now make it sound like me again."

name: The Lifelong Learner
blurb: If it can be explained, you've asked for it to be explained.

name: The Money Mind
blurb: Budgets, returns, and quietly compounding curiosity.

name: The Curious Polymath
blurb: You can't stay on one topic for long, and that's the point.

name: The Renaissance Hobbyist
blurb: Sourdough in January, bouldering in March, watercolors in July.

name: The Power User
blurb: If chat tokens were frequent flyer miles, you'd own a small airline.

name: The Two-Tab Diplomat
blurb: Ask ChatGPT, ask Claude, pick the one you already agreed with.

name: The Tinkerer
blurb: There is no problem that cannot be solved with a how-to and some grit.

name: The Quiet Listener
blurb: Short, sharp questions. You know exactly what you want.

name: The Question Machine
blurb: Why? But why? Okay but really why? You'd make Socrates proud.

name: The Polite One
blurb: The AI doesn't have feelings, but if it did, it would adore you.

name: The Apologetic One
blurb: You said "sorry" to a language model. We respect the energy.

name: The Emoji Poet
blurb: Why use 100 words when 12 emojis will do? 💯🔥✨

name: The Deep Diver
blurb: Your conversations go on for chapters. You don't stop until you really know.

name: The Comma Splicer
blurb: One message, no punctuation, three paragraphs of stream-of-consciousness. The AI got it.

name: The Maker-It-Better
blurb: "Now make it punchier." "Now shorter." "Now better." Forever.

name: The Existential Snacker
blurb: Show up, ask if free will exists, log off, make a sandwich.

name: The Pet Parent
blurb: Half your conversations start with "is it normal that my dog…"

name: The Hyperfixator
blurb: For three weeks straight you only wanted to talk about one thing.
